video_title: AI B-roll: Full Melt Pool (candle making)

seconds.vision_desc: top-down view of a burning jar candle, melt pool touching the glass all around
thin even layer of clear liquid wax edge to edge
steady centered flame, slow orbital drift
wax surface glassy, reflections turning with the camera
the full pool reads as a textbook first burn
flame steady at center of the liquid disc
final overhead framing of the perfect pool

windows.embed_text: top-down slow orbit of a burning glass jar candle whose melt pool reaches the glass edge to edge, thin even liquid layer, steady centered flame, warm light on a wooden bench | the perfect edge-to-edge first burn melt pool
